author: codex-root

patch.value:
## Current reproducible anchors

At audit time: 1,786 total items; 200 active; 1,601 parent edges; 1,137 dependency entries; 665 items with dependencies; 109 active dependency components; 100 active dependency isolates; longest active order-bearing path two edges; parent depth max four; no active normalized-title duplicate cluster; no active lifecycle cycle or dangling dependency endpoint.

These are baselines, not target quotas. The task must rerun and timestamp every measure when claimed.

## Deliverables

A counts-first report, machine-readable finding stream, waiver registry, explicit uncertainty queue, and exact proposed relationship operations for Wave 1.
Wave 0 graph baseline and waiver ledger: classify roots, active dependency isolates, legacy aliases, and body-to-edge drift
Publish a reproducible all-status graph baseline and classify every currently suspicious sparse or semantically ambiguous case before changing relationships.

Record snapshot identity, commands, schema and package versions, counts by status and type, parent-depth distribution, edge kinds, components, isolates, ordering depth, dangling endpoints, and history integrity; Classify all roots and active dependency isolates as intentional, governed sparse, incomplete, ambiguous, archived, or remediation debt with reason and reviewer state; Detect item bodies and comments that name explicit prerequisites or delivery links missing from dependency metadata and record source excerpts or event pointers without auto-mutating; Map related_to and other legacy aliases plus parent or child duplication into candidate canonical kinds while preserving uncertainty; Produce cursorable machine-readable findings and a compact summary whose limits, omissions, and snapshot are explicit; Run exact, fuzzy, and parent-scope duplicate scans plus validate, health, and history-drift checks; baseline creation makes no terminal-item mutations
Turn audit counts into a deterministic evidence and waiver ledger that later waves can safely execute
Every proposed graph change starts from a reviewed finding rather than a density target or intuition
Prevents synthetic links and makes reconstruction resumable, measurable, and multi-agent safe
Versioned baseline metrics, exact item classifications, waiver reasons, body-to-edge findings, and proposed remediation records
The current baseline has 185 hierarchy roots overall, 100 active dependency isolates, alias drift, and documented prerequisites absent from metadata

value.author: codex-root
value.text: Duplicate check 2026-07-13: prior audits captured point-in-time state but no open execution task owns the typed graph baseline,isolate classification,waiver ledger,and body-to-edge drift required by pm-a8zm.

message: Create Wave 0 graph baseline and waiver task
